posts.title: Hello, world
posts.summary: A first note to mark the opening of this blog. Longer writing on economics, data, and everything in between will live here.
posts.content:
This is the first post on the blog, mostly here to hold the door open.

I plan to use this space for longer, looser writing than the rest of the site allows: notes on ongoing research, things I am reading, data curiosities, and the occasional detour into cricket analytics.

More soon.
